s0-foundation.passes: upload source → passthrough → readback matches input

s1-ascii-compute.passes: synthetic fixture validation (no develop chain dependency): structureWeight=0 reproduces density-based selection within ±1 atlas slot; structureWeight=1 self-rendered glyph fixtures are recovered by the matcher; <16ms at 1080p cellSize=12 on real GPU (fallback adapters informational only — pending real-GPU run). Production parity deferred to s6.

s2-photo-core.passes: pixel comparison vs WebGL2: inputDecode, geometry, master, outputEncode < 2/255 (validated maxDiff=0/255 on SwiftShader fallback; real-GPU run pending)

s5-masking-post.passes: gradient mask + brush mask + halation render correctly

s5b-backend-adapter.passes: RenderBackend interface lands in src/render/image/; WebGL2RenderBackend wraps existing path with zero pixel/behavioral change (existing tests pass unchanged); WebGPURenderBackend skeleton runs behind feature flag for s0-s5 covered cases without throwing; render result contract { status, surface, fallbackReason? } reported end-to-end and KEEP_LAST_PREVIEW_FRAME_ON_ERROR removed; inter-stage handoff types changed from canvas to GPU texture handle.

s6-integration.passes: default backend switched to WebGPURenderBackend (one-point switch); orchestrator.ts implemented as named-step sequence (resolveCacheState/fetchOrComputeSource/applyGeometry/runPipeline/composeLocal/produceSurface), not transplanted nested if; cache key builder src/lib/gpu/cacheKeys.ts shipped at v1 with no ad-hoc concatenation remaining; ASCII production-parity check passes; full app smoke test, preview + export work, no WebGL2 in render path.

s7-cleanup.passes: clean build, no WebGL/twgl/glsl refs in src/lib/gpu/, decisions.md updated
